scholarships.name: NYU Tandon Scholarship
scholarships.description: The NYU Tandon Scholarship is awarded to incoming graduate students at the Tandon School of Engineering based on academic merit. The scholarship aims to support high-achieving students pursuing their graduate studies.
scholarships.perks: Significant tuition fellowship. Access to Tandon's state-of-the-art facilities and research opportunities.

scholarships.name: Hope for Healing
scholarships.description: FHE Health is accepting applications for two $5000 "Hope for Healing" Scholarships. The scholarship is offered to one qualified, college-level applicant enrolled in an undergraduate program of study and one qualified, graduate-level applicant enrolled in a Masters or Doctorate program of study.
scholarships.perks: A $5,000 scholarship for tuition and academic expenses. Recognition as a Hope for Healing scholar.

contact.address: 505 Federal Hwy #2, Deerfield Beach, Flo, 33441, United States

scholarships.name: Inlaks Scholarship
scholarships.income_criteria: No strict limit, but need preferred
scholarships.description: The Inlaks Shivdasani Foundation awards scholarships to meritorious Indian students to study at top universities abroad. The scholarship covers tuition fees, living expenses, and travel.
scholarships.perks: Full or partial funding for overseas studies. Membership in a prestigious network of scholars.

scholarships.name: Narotam Sekhsaria
scholarships.description: The Narotam Sekhsaria Foundation provides interest-free loan scholarships to Indian students with a consistently good academic record who wish to pursue postgraduate studies at prestigious institutions abroad.
scholarships.perks: Interest-free loan scholarship. Mentorship and guidance for academic success.

contact.address: 1st Floor, Nirmal Building, Nariman Point, Mumbai 400021

scholarships.name: KC Mahindra
scholarships.description: The K. C. Mahindra Education Trust provides interest-free loan scholarships to Indian graduates wishing to pursue postgraduate studies abroad in various fields.
scholarships.perks: Financial support for higher education abroad. Recognition by a leading philanthropic trust.

contact.address: Mahindra Towers, P.K. Kurne Chowk, Worli, Mumbai 400018
